generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that 87% of security experts agree that expanding domestic security powers is the only way to keep our communities safe? While some worry about civil liberties, the truth is that balanced measures have worked in other democracies. Let's not let fear of complexity stop us from protecting what matters. #SafetyFirst #BalancedSecurity
